source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/260123 태국 Hollywood, 23G 및 P1 등록서류 - 이창민 팀장님/Portable/11. Safety Declaration.docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Safety declaration to the Thai Food and Drug Administration for Portable X-ray System model HnX-P1.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Declares no global safety issues, deaths, serious health deterioration, or open field safety corrective actions for the listed device during the stated period for a Thai medical device application.
keyPoints: H&abyz Co., Ltd. identifies itself as the Legal manufacturer and Product Owner.
The covered medical device is Portable X-ray System, model HnX-P1.
The declaration states no safety issues globally when used as intended in the last one year from 31/01/2025 to 31/12/2025.
The declaration states no reported deaths, no reported serious deterioration in health, and no open field safety corrective actions including recalls at submission.
The declaration cites the Medical Device Act (B.E.2551), Medical Device Act (2nd edition B.E.2562), and other applicable laws.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: I, H&abyz Co., Ltd., the Legal manufacturer and Product Owner

concepts.name: Safety declaration
concepts.evidence: hereby declare that there are no safety issues globally associated with the use of the medical device(s)

concepts.name: Field safety corrective action
concepts.evidence: No open field safety corrective actions (including recalls) at the point of submission of this application.

concepts.name: Serious deterioration in the state of health
concepts.pageTarget: Serious Deterioration in the State of Health
concepts.evidence: Serious deterioration in the state of health, in relation to a person means: (a) a life-threatening illness or injury

concepts.name: Medical Device Act (2nd edition B.E.2562)
concepts.pageTarget: Thailand Medical Device Act 2nd Edition B.E.2562

evidence.claim: The document is a Safety Declaration Template addressed to Thai medical device authorities.
evidence.evidenceText:
Safety Declaration Template

Medical Devices Control Division

Thai Food and Drug Administration

Ministry of Public Health

evidence.claim: H&abyz Co., Ltd. is the Legal manufacturer and Product Owner for the listed medical device.
evidence.evidenceText: I, H&abyz Co., Ltd., the Legal manufacturer and Product Owner, of the medical device(s) stated below

evidence.claim: The declaration covers Portable X-ray System model HnX-P1.
evidence.evidenceText:
Product name

Portable X-ray System

Model name

HnX-P1

evidence.claim: The declaration states no global safety issues when used as intended during the stated period.
evidence.evidenceText: there are no safety issues globally associated with the use of the medical device(s) when used as intended by the Product Owner, in the last one year from 31/01/2025 to 31/12/2025

evidence.claim: The declaration states there were no reported deaths.
The declaration states there was no reported serious deterioration in the state of health of any person.
evidence.evidenceText: No reported serious deterioration in the state of health1 of any person;
evidence.pageTarget: Serious Deterioration in the State of Health

evidence.claim: The declaration states there were no open field safety corrective actions, including recalls, at submission.
evidence.evidenceText: No open field safety corrective actions (including recalls) at the point of submission of this application.

evidence.claim: The declaration cites penalties or consequences under Thai medical device laws for false declaration or registration non-compliance.
evidence.evidenceText: making a declaration which I know to be false is an offence under the Medical Device Act (B.E.2551), Medical Device Act (2nd edition B.E.2562) and other applicable laws

evidence.claim: Non-compliance with registration conditions issued by the Thai Food and Drug Administration may result in suspension or cancellation of medical device registration.
evidence.evidenceText: any non-compliance with any registration condition issued by the Thai Food and Drug Administration in relation to medical devices registered with the Medical Device Control Division may result in the suspension or cancellation of the medical devices registration.
